text:
Created attachment 201338
4.0.1.0 diff

Hi folks, we finally got around publishing a new release, this latest diff should be the final one. Unfortunately I still can't test poudriere as it keeps failing to build llvm, so it would be awesome if someone else could. Portlint at least seems to be happy, and I can build and install the port fine locally.
